# Prerequisites

Before you start, make sure you have the following:

- An **Azion account**. If you don't have one, [create your account](https://console.azion.com/signup) — it's free to get started.
- Access to **Azion Console**, the web-based interface where you'll create and manage your functions.

:::info No local setup required
You don't need to install anything on your machine for this guide. Everything runs directly in the browser through Azion Console.
:::

## What you'll build

In this Getting Started guide, you'll deploy a small Edge Function that responds to HTTP requests with a random Pokémon card — fetching live data from [PokéAPI](https://pokeapi.co/) and returning an HTML response, all at the edge.

By the end, you'll have gone through the full deployment flow:

1. Writing and saving a function
2. Creating an Edge Application
3. Exposing it through a Workload
4. Accessing it via a public domain
5. Observing execution logs

## Next step

Once your account is ready, proceed to [Create Your First Function](./create-function).
